nasb.text: So the abundance will be unknown in the land because of that subsequent famine; for it will be very severe.

esv.text: and the plenty will be unknown in the land by reason of the famine that will follow, for it will be very severe.

cnv.text: 因為接著而來的饑荒太嚴重了，使人不覺得這地有過豐收。

ccb.text: 饥荒将非常严重，之前的丰收将荡然无存。

csbs.text: 那地先前的丰收一点也看不出来，因为随后而来的饥荒极其严重。
